name: Mini's Rally Legends
tagline: 24 stage-bred rally icons. Suspension tuned. Telemetry verified.
description: A focused collection of homologation-era rally machines, each with a hand-built gravel and tarmac config. Differentials, dampers, and gear ratios are dialled per car against real stage data — no copy-paste tunes. Built for sideways commitment and repeatable stage times.

notes: Reworked gravel suspension travel across the pack
Snow/ice tyre configs added for every car
Reduced engine thermal failures on long stages
